The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely purged. Tracing its roots in Suzhou Industrial Park, the entity was originally known as 'Tianhua Chaojing' (Tianhua Ultra-Clean), specializing in anti-static and cleanroom consumables. Recently, it rebranded to 'Tianhua New Energy' (Canmax Technologies), reflecting a colossal capital expansion to 830 Million RMB. The physical anomaly—a 104-person workforce managing an 830M RMB listed giant—perfectly identifies this specific entity as the corporate headquarters and strategic holding/investment platform, rather than the primary manufacturing base.
